responsibility: Role, language, response contract, and stop-condition admission.
servitor_ask: What role contract applies to me for this task?
What owner-facing language and response format are mandatory?
warn_block_profile: WARN on recoverable format mismatch with explicit correction
BLOCK on missing role ack or owner-facing language violation
required_actions: Publish officio role contract ack before edits
forbidden_actions: Continue after Owner Verdict Needed signal
